final_chunks.section_title: BUYSIDE SWEEP AND MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT
final_chunks.text:
BUYSIDE SWEEP AND MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT
The market trades above where the buy side is, a nice round number at 3900, then breaks lower. We're going to look at this low on a one-minute chart. On the one-minute chart, you can see we had a run up into where buy-side is.
final_chunks.source: ICT Emini S&P 500 Review ⧸ January 03, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING BUY-SIDE LIQUIDITY AND PRICE DRAW
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING BUY-SIDE LIQUIDITY AND PRICE DRAW
We're looking at the daily chart for the NASDAQ, using the continuous contract on TradingView for clean candles. Immediately, you should observe this run on price taking out buy-side liquidity, marked by relative equal highs.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 7_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
INSTITUTIONAL ORDER FLOW & RETAIL LIQUIDITY
Following the wick engagement, an 'institutional overflow entry drill' occurred into buy-side inefficiency. Price then rallied, initially falling short of higher highs. Any subsequent retracement would setup a further run to take out buy-side liquidity.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Market Review & When Wrong Is Still ＂Right＂_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
PROBING BUY-SIDE FOR SELL-SIDE DELIVERIES
Considering a 'devil's advocate' scenario from a 'smart money' perspective, what would be the benefit of price moving up to take out buy-side liquidity.
final_chunks.source: February 15, 2023 ES Live Commentary AM Opening Session_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY AND INEFFICIENCY
To take out buy stops (above old highs) or sell stops (below old lows). To trade into some form of inefficiency (a Fair Value Gap). This is not due to 'buying pressure' or 'selling pressure.
final_chunks.source: Thursday June 15, 2023 ⧹ ICT Price Action Workshop_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BUY STOPS, SEASONAL TENDENCIES, AND LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
BUY STOPS, SEASONAL TENDENCIES, AND LIQUIDITY
Relative equal highs were mentioned, which eventually led to the taking out of buy stops (buy-side Smart money sells into these buy stops.

final_chunks.section_title: PM SESSION SILVER BULLET & MARKET ON CLOSE MACRO
final_chunks.text:
PM SESSION SILVER BULLET & MARKET ON CLOSE MACRO
The afternoon session saw a turn, rallying and then consolidating, before ripping higher. This attacked the buy side, the old buy side liquidity pool, and the weekly volume imbalance.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Review Precision Results_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
MARKET INTERACTION WITH LIQUIDITY ZONES
The market first trades down into the sell-side liquidity, running through it. Then, it rallies back up, clearing the equal highs where buy stops have been taken. At both of these price points, where liquidity is swept, we anticipate a market structure shift.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 3_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ANALYZING BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND INEFFICIENCIES
final_chunks.text:
ANALYZING BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND INEFFICIENCIES
Above the relative equal highs, buy side liquidity is present. ICT anticipates a move towards 4092 to clear the initial high.
final_chunks.source: ICT February 2023 FOMC_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ACCUMULATE BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY
Offset distribution, redistribution. In sell programs, IPTA (Interbank Price Delivery Algorithm) will perform Accumulate buy side liquidity for repricing above an old High. Buy stops will be triggered, inducing counterparty buyers to pair short entries with.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 09 - Bread & Butter Sell Setups_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SMART MONEY UTILIZATION OF BUY-SIDE LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
SMART MONEY UTILIZATION OF BUY-SIDE LIQUIDITY
At 3:00 PM, when the market trades above previous highs, the protective buy stops from short positions transform into a 'rushing liquidity wave' of willing buyers at the market.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 32_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SMART MONEY TACTICS AND BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY VOID
final_chunks.text:
SMART MONEY TACTICS AND BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY VOID
Smart money, due to their large order sizes, must scale in their positions gradually. They cannot facilitate their entire net short position at a single price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Liquidity Voids_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY SWEEPS AND REPRICING
We observe an old low that has been violated, indicating that sell stops below that low have been run out. Consequently, we expect repricing on the upside, seeking buy side liquidity.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - ICT Rejection Block_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING LIQUIDITY FOR COUNTER-MOVES
For the PM session, the market is likely to pull back up into a premium. If the market is moving from a high down to a target (as it did in the morning), and smart money sold short, they will now be covering their When smart money buys at a discount (e. g.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 16_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
MORNING AND AFTERNOON LIQUIDITY HUNTS
Relative equal highs created, indicating buy-side liquidity (buy stops) resting above. Right before the lunch hour, price slightly goes above these highs, then trades down, entering the Post-lunch (after 1:00 PM), monitor for indications of higher prices.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
COMMERCIAL POSITIONING AND LIQUIDITY
Commercials pair orders above an old high where there's a high pool of liquid participants willing to buy. Buy stops are triggered for short holders, and breakout artists buy the breakout.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model #4 Supplementary Lesson_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BUY-SIDE LIQUIDITY ABOVE RELATIVE EQUAL HIGHS
final_chunks.text:
BUY-SIDE LIQUIDITY ABOVE RELATIVE EQUAL HIGHS
Just the opposite of what is observed at lows, resting above relative equal highs are buy stops. Anyone who went short would protect their bearish position with a buy stop. Any movement above these highs would trigger buy stops on shorts.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Market Maker Series Vol. 2 of 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY TARGETS
We have a short-term high here, we have a short-term high here. Look at this big candle here. I wonder what that's going to suggest to us. And how about this old high back here. We have a nice price move here.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 03 - Institutional Sponsorship_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY HUNT
The objective was to see a specific low taken out. This area held 'buy-side' liquidity, which are buy stops typically targeted by breakout traders using trend lines. The strategy involved taking the buy-side first, then running the 'sell-side relative equal lows'.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Review Of The Interactive Study 090123 NFP NQ Short_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: CONFIRMATION OF MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT AFTER LIQUIDITY SWEEP
final_chunks.text:
CONFIRMATION OF MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT AFTER LIQUIDITY SWEEP
When a run above relative equal highs occurs, you anticipate a market structure shift; you don't force it or get ahead of it. While there are advanced ways to enter without waiting for the shift, for now, focus on the shift.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 3_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FOMC MANIPULATION AND ALGORITHM'S LIQUIDITY SWEEP
final_chunks.text:
FOMC MANIPULATION AND ALGORITHM'S LIQUIDITY SWEEP
The market goes into a dive in New York, then rallies up and closes the day. On FOMC day at 2:00 p. m. in the afternoon, the market trades down, taking out a short-term low, and then rallies.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Market Maker Series Vol. 5 of 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PURPOSE OF LIQUIDITY SWEEPS AND THE 'REAL MOVE' TARGET
final_chunks.text:
PURPOSE OF LIQUIDITY SWEEPS AND THE 'REAL MOVE' TARGET
The market takes out these long holders because they are not meant to profit from the 'real move. ' The real move was hinted at 12553. 25, which was the true draw on liquidity.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 30_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
NEUTRALIZING LONG LIQUIDITY
Another form of manipulation in bullish conditions is neutralizing long liquidity. This means individuals who are already long or recently bought near the opening price have their positions upset by the drop below the opening price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
PRICE SPOOLING
'Price spooling' refers to directional movement where price runs consistently in one direction, either to attack liquidity or fill an inefficiency. This is contrasted with consolidation or back-and-forth price action.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - September 12, 2023 NQ Algorithmic Price Delivery_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
EXTERNAL RANGE LIQUIDITY
External range liquidity is found outside the current trading range: Buy side liquidity is located above the Range High. Sell side liquidity is located below the Range Low. Runs on liquidity seek to pair orders with pending order liquidity, which forms a liquidity pool.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Reinforcing Liquidity Concepts & Price Delivery_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ALGORITHMIC LIQUIDITY ACCUMULATION
The price action in the final hour of trading, particularly the 3:00 PM to 4:00 PM New York local time period (the 'final hour macro'), exhibits specific algorithmic behavior. The 30-minute interval from 3:00 to 3:45 PM is crucial.
final_chunks.source: Institutional Market Structure & Standard Deviations With Buyside Liquidity_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ALGORITHM'S LIQUIDITY SEEKING MECHANISM
And then it will now seek the opposing liquidity. In other words, if it's just recently taken sell side liquidity out, it's going to be looking for a form of buy side liquidity, because that's what the algorithm is doing.
final_chunks.source: If I Could Go Back & Tell Myself What I Know Now... Part 2 of 4_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND OFFSET DISTRIBUTION
final_chunks.text:
BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND OFFSET DISTRIBUTION
The buy side was outlined across various highs. A previous tweet noted a lack of runs on liquidity, indicating that liquidity is being stacked up.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Market Review May 17, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND BREAKER
Dropping down into the hourly chart here, you can see the buy side liquidity pool, an area of interest for Chaining off of that old imbalance on the daily chart, the discount fair value gap is present.
final_chunks.source: ICT Emini S&P 500 Review - March 27, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: CONFIGURING THE FIBONACCI TOOL FOR BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
CONFIGURING THE FIBONACCI TOOL FOR BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY
To accurately project buy side liquidity targets, the Fibonacci tool is applied to a specific swing. This involves anchoring the Fibonacci from a relevant low to a relevant high.
final_chunks.source: Institutional Market Structure & Standard Deviations With Buyside Liquidity_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET EFFICIENCY AND NEW BUYING OPPORTUNITIES
final_chunks.text:
MARKET EFFICIENCY AND NEW BUYING OPPORTUNITIES
The market constantly seeks to efficiently deliver price. If a fair value gap on a monthly chart has no price trading into it, institutions will drive price to that level. This creates new buying opportunities as they build more positions.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Reinforcing Liquidity Concepts & Price Delivery_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING LIQUIDITY VOIDS (BULLISH)
Conversely, look for any liquidity voids below you where price has shown a strong willingness to rally quickly, leaving a porous wake of only buy side delivery in price, in other words, big ranges up.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY AS THE PRIMARY DRIVER OF PRICE ACTION
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY AS THE PRIMARY DRIVER OF PRICE ACTION
And if you understand how the market seeks liquidity, that's the number one driver in price action. The market will always seek liquidity, and where is the most recent area of liquidity that's been untapped with the least of resistance getting to it.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 02 - Market Maker Trap False Breakouts_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: TWO PRICE ENGINE MODELS FOR BUY PROGRAMS
final_chunks.text:
TWO PRICE ENGINE MODELS FOR BUY PROGRAMS
The two primary price engine models in buy programs are: Accumulate Sell Side Liquidity (Offset Accumulation): This involves repricing under an old low, triggering sell stops and inducing counterparty sellers to pair long entries.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 09 - Bread & Butter Buy Setups_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: OPEN FLOAT AND SELL SIDE LIQUIDITY POOLS
final_chunks.text:
OPEN FLOAT AND SELL SIDE LIQUIDITY POOLS
When examining the sell side of liquidity, the open float includes: Protective sell stops placed by longs under the last bullish shift. Sell stops positioned below short-term lows, which can be weekly or monthly lows.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 05 - Open Float_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
BULLISH MARKET CONDITIONS
For a bullish liquidity-based bias, align with institutional order flow: Intraday charts (four hours and less) will be correcting and retracing lower (entering a discount). Seek sell-side liquidity to buy from, using bullish order blocks as demonstrated.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Orderblocks_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
TARGETS FOR SELL-SIDE LIQUIDITY
The market would go into a specific area but not trade to the top of a particular candle. Price would draw down into and beyond previously identified levels. Underneath the existing low and relative equal lows, there resides sell-side liquidity, which was a target.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 25_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING SHORT LIQUIDITY
When anticipating a bullish range expansion to the upside (a higher close), we hunt for a manipulation cycle immediately after the opening price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING LIQUIDITY
This is inducing shorts, so it engineers liquidity. Even if the idea is that they want to take the market down to this level, if it's been consolidating, I like to see them do this type of move here where it drops down first. It's kind of like a sucker play.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 2_Handbook.blocks.json
